programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' forårsaker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran alvorlige skader når de spiller 'Hjemmegolf', møter bygningsarbeidere som morer seg med 'Jobbskøyere' og blir vitner til vindens kraft i 'Tatt av vinden'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' deltar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran i timen med 'Forelesningssabotører', stopper hjorter som foretar 'Bukkattakk' og flipper helt når de får seg en 'Turntrøkk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' triller Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran ut på skumruller i 'Fatal foam', tar begrepet "hot date" til neste nivå med 'Ildfulle utekvelder' og kommer litt for nær de verste flysetenaboene i 'Ekle passasjerer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' leker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran utryddere i 'Kryppatruljen', blir spesielt følsomme og feller 'Kjærlighetstårer' og skater ute i det ville i 'Bli i parken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran nye farer ved å drikke i 'Ølskutt', møter folk som blir oppglødd når de går i bakken i 'Krasjglad' og fortsetter å kjøre i 'Kan ikke og vil ikke stoppe'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Karrueche Tran trygg avstand til 'Kanonballknusere', bommer på svingslagforsøk med 'Luftslag' og forbløffes av folk som beveger seg så smidig at 'Det kan være magi'.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en av de tapt grunnleggerne av Commonwealth, men oppdager at hun kan være mer trøbbel enn hun er verdt.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dyrets mage
programme.desc: Et mytologisk rommonster prøver å spise Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ridderen, døden og djevelen
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å frigjøre en flåte med fangede skip, men flåten er ikke sikker på at den vil bli frigjort. AI-ene deres frykter at nye kapteiner vil slavebinde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genitter angriper Tyrs kone og koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tunnel ved enden av lyset
programme.desc: Med femti partier ombord er Dylan vert for signeringen av New Commonwealth-charteret, men oppdager snart at det er inntrengere som har til hensikt å stoppe signeringen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hvis hjulet er løst
programme.desc: Beka og Tyr blir overtatt av energien fra en dimensjonal tunnel. Dylan, Trance og Harper må redde dem før de ødelegger skipet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss, Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Folsom Escape, Georgetown Arson, Amnesia, State Department Murder, Update: Glendeen's Goal and Mona Lisa.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Death by Drowning, Thanks Captain Sharp, Pigtail Fugitive, Two Strikes, Direct Contact and Update: Badlands.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Gangbusters Pts. 1 & 2, St. James' Ghost, Crystal and Cop Killer Escape.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: Suicide Homicide, Ogo Pogo, Dr. Craig, Forensic Woman, Lifeguard Missing, Update: Alamo Treasure and I-70 Killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fatherly Love, Good Samaritan Abductor, Halloween Party Death, Update: Meredith's Mother, Carwash Kidnap and Children from Heaven.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: The Blob, Freedon, John Wilkes Booth Pts. 1 & 2, Update: Smoker Car Baby and Hitchhiking Killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Vanished
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Unlawful Flight
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Federal Offense
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack  whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons  the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Living In Terror
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Women Who Kill
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Infallible Witness
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental "brain fingerprinting" technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Deep in the woods on the outskirts of Liverpool lie the crumbling remains of a forgotten gatehouse — and the land surrounding it is said to be cursed. As Sean and Bex begin their nighttime investigation, unsettling activity begins to unfold.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Sean and Bex head to one of Leeds’ oldest public libraries, where the silence hides more than just books. Reports of shadow figures, unexplained voices, and a terrifying presence in the basement have kept rumours alive for decades.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the first of a five-part investigation inside the historic Greenfield Valley Heritage Park, the team explores the eerie ruins of the old mills. Known for reports of ghostly children, unexplained footsteps, and phantom knocks on stone walls.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: As the team delves deeper into the Valley Mills, subtle sounds begin to stir the silence—unheard by the cameras, but felt by those present. A chilling metallic swing echoes through the empty building with no visible source.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this chilling third part of our Greenfield Valley investigation, we continue deep within the historic mills—where echoes of the past seem to come alive. With intense K2 meter spikes, disembodied footsteps and unexplained sounds.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the historic heart of Greenfield Valley Mills, Sean and Bex uncover chilling echoes of its industrial past. Once alive with the hum of machinery and the toil of mill workers, the site now stands in eerie silence.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Fake Your Pregnancies?
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Starving Myself to Death
programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: The night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Standoff
programme.desc: A disabled man is killed on the job, but Kenda’s case hits a roadblock when forensic evidence is scrubbed from the scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When a mysterious explosion rocks a sleepy suburb, it’s up to Kenda to ID a pile of charred remains and find the killer who triggered the blast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Joanne Dennehy
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan returns to uncover the truth behind the horrific crimes of Peterborough serial killer Joanna Dennehy.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Vow of Silence and Cryptic
programme.desc: A single mother's new home was once a convent that kept a horrifying secret. A couple is tormented by the meaning of a date that keeps appearing in their new home.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Family Grave and Deception
programme.desc: A man's childhood fears come to life when he returns to his family's farm after his mother's death. A woman begins to suspect that her withdrawn husband may be causing the unexplainable occurrences in their new home.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Attic and 'Til Death
programme.desc: A college student is tormented by her little sister's imaginary friend. A newly engaged woman sees visions of her fiance's widow.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Boy in the Closet
programme.desc: A couple is haunted by the spirit of a little boy who lives in their young son's bedroom closet. A gas station owner's life is abruptly changed by the appearance of a mysterious paranormal mist with a demonic presence.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: Screams in the Dark
programme.desc: Two men retire without knowing their new home sits on the graves of people who were tortured and murdered by the KKK. The Queen Mary once ruled the high seas, but now ghosts roam her decks.

programme.title: Mutant X: Dancing on the Razor
programme.desc: Når Mutant X og Genomex blir fanget på film ved hjelp av kreftene sine, må de begge forholde seg til reporteren som planlegger å bli offentlig med informasjonen.

programme.title: Mutant X: Ex Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Shalimars tidligere kjæreste dukker opp og prøver å gjenopprette et Fabergé-egg som har en mikrochip med ekstraordinær kraft.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Frankrike for å lete etter de tapte bryllupsløftene til Josephine Pontoise og Guy de Bourdin, noe som skulle bevise at arvingen er den rettmessige eieren av St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel reiser til Frankrike for å finne de tapte steinene fra Marie Antoinettes krone.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel blir gjenforent med Stewie Harper i jakten på sannhetens kalk i Frankrike.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Paris, Frankrike etter sverdet til Jacques de Molay, stormester for tempelridderne. Rival relikviejeger Rita Rosellini er også ute etter sverdet.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Reporting on international news stories, interviews, and in-depth pieces, covering topics from news, sports, climate and technology to race, health, parenting and personal finance.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7 Mornings
programme.desc: Få med deg de seneste nyhetene fra CBS direkte her med omfattende nyhetsreportasjer døgnet rundt fra hele verden.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Call
programme.desc: When bartender Anita Andrews is stabbed to death inside her family's bar, police conclude her killer was the last patron she served that night.

programme.title: On the Case: Deep Wounds
programme.desc: After Navy electrician Michael Jacobs comes home to find his wife, Suzanne, and his three-year-old son, Colin, murdered, San Diego police race to catch a serial killer who leaves behind an unimaginable calling card.

programme.title: On the Case: Lost In The Fire
programme.desc: When a pregnant mother of two is found shot to death in her fire-ravaged home, police find there are more suspects than clues.

programme.title: On the Case: Predator on the Loose
programme.desc: A deadly predator haunts the city of Stockton, California and becomes more and more violent.

programme.title: On the Case: Mystery In The Desert
programme.desc: When an innocent couple is murdered execution-style in the Arizona desert it marks the beginning of a 50-year search for the truth. Who really killed them and why? After decades of investigation, the controversial case remains shrouded in mystery.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Air Show
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Five Seasons
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebrates a milestone with a look back at the last five years, a peek behind the camera and reflections from the Buffalo crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Ball O'Snags
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Storm
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Old Dogs
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Checkflight
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bronwyn Tarboton, Drew's News
programme.desc: Bronwyn Tarboton is sharing some genius upcycling tips including how to create home décor out of items in your trash.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Guy Fieri, Damona Hoffman, Pilar Valdes, Robin Black
programme.desc: "Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives" host Guy Fieri is joining Drew to chat and play a game! Dating expert Damona Hoffman is joining Drew, Ross Mathews and his husband Wellington Garciato talk about love and soulmates.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Taye Diggs, Jamila Norman, Jeralyn Gerba, Nadine Jane
programme.desc: "All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Senator Bernie Sanders, Drew's News
programme.desc: Senator Bernie Sanders is joining Drew to chat about his new book. He's also joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss local Vermont headlines and share some of his favorite Vermont-based small businesses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jabari Banks, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Bel-Air" star Jabari Banks is joining Drew to chat about his show. Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Gayle King, Drew & Ross Visit Montana
programme.desc: "CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines, covering topics like the woman who found an unusual way to calm her nerves before a first kiss.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Gayle King, Brittany O'Grady and Nat Wolf
programme.desc: "CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines. Plus, its Drew' News: The Weekender Edition, a curated list of must-haves, must watches and more to do this weekend from Drew!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Whitney Cummings, Anita Tam, Drew's News with Whitney Cummings
programme.desc: "At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Patricia Field, Pilar Valdes, Drew's News
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Rebel Wilson, Lauren Makk
programme.desc: "The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Eliza VanCort, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Defending Your Life
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kim and Beth Jones have been trying to prove that their father, Jerry Jones, Jr. is innocent of the 1988 murder of their mother, Lee. Jones was found guilty, but in 1999, the court ordered him released due to an ineffective lawyer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets of Palm Beach
programme.desc: A report about the murder of Linda Fishman, a wealthy widow found murdered in her Florida home. The childless woman had always been known for her generosity and at first it was suspected that her nephew was responsible for the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Brightin Ax Murder
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: Cops: Pants Party
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: Cops: Smooth Move
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: Cops: Highway to Jail
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops: Dishonest Dudes
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: Cops: Fighting to Lose
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: Cops: Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: Cops: The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: Cops: Too Many Cooks
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: Cops: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Party in a Box
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)
programme.desc: On the night of July 16, 2000, the life of Edwige Alessandri changed forever. She made a frantic emergency call in the town of Carpentras. She recounted that some men burst into her room and shot her husband while he slept.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Raphael Lomoro Case
programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Call
programme.desc: A lonely man accidentally phones the wrong number and finds an intriguing female to whom he grows attached. When she refuses to meet him, he investigates and finds the phone in a museum next to the statue of a woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trance
programme.desc: A scam artist purports to channel the spirit of Delos, a former inhabitant of Atlantis. Together with a partner, he makes a living off of it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Acts of Terror
programme.desc: A woman terrorized by her abusive husband finds some small consolation in a statue of a dog given to her by her sympathetic sister

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Twenty Vision
programme.desc: Newly promoted bank loan officer Warren Cribbens cracks his eyeglasses and discovers he can see the future through them. Faced with seeing the future of the farmers whose farms he must foreclose on, Warren can't bring himself to foreclose.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Passersby
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Game of Pool
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mirror
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Grave
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: There Was an Old Woman
programme.desc: A writer of children's books gives a book to a sick young fan. Later, she starts hearing the sound of children in her house.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trunk
programme.desc: A young man at a motel discovers an empty trunk that grants any wishes. He uses it for popularity, but at a party he discovers who his true friends are.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Issa Rae Raps While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Issa Rae, the multitalented writer, producer and actress, traces her glow up from Stanford to TV.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Alexa Chung Fears for Her Life While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Alexa Chung takes on the wings of death and explains how she got banned from red carpet hosting duties.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Timberlake and Fatone take on the gauntlet for a second time and the rest of the band joins them.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Andy Cohen Spills the Tea While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The "Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen" star is no stranger to talk shows going off the rails.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Simu Liu stars in 2021's highest-grossing box office film, "Shang-Chi," but can he smash the spice?

programme.title: Hot Ones: Padma Lakshmi Gracefully Destroys Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Sean Evans is kicking things off with a special guest who is synonymous with spice: Padma Lakshmi.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Daniel Kaluuya is an Academy Award-winning actor you know from "Get Out," "Blank Panther" and many more.

programme.title: Hot Ones: J Balvin Meets the Devil While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: J Balvin is a 5x Latin Grammy Award winner and prince of reggaeton, plus the king of streaming, worldwide.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Salma Hayek is an Academy Award-nominated actress and film producer who is here to conquer the spice.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: More than two million people die in the U.S. annually, creating 5,500 daily burials with 80 percent choosing caskets and 20 percent cremation; explore dealing with death throughout centuries and today's $20-billion funeral industry.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Chrome hot rod; the Chrome Shop Mafia adds bling to truckers' big rigs in Missouri; Illinois' Arlington Plating Co. adds luster to auto parts; how Harley-Davidson puts chrome to work as both a decorative and protective feature of motorcycles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: America's technologically advanced military descends from Civil War innovations; the first modern war introduced machine guns, aerial reconnaissance, battlefield medicine, ironclad ships, and aircraft carriers that revolutionized warfare.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Data lines; power; plumbing; photovoltaics; conserving energy; painting; carpeting; moving furniture; lights.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Americans insert more than 3.5 million coins into vending machines every 15 minutes; how vending machines work; visiting a factory that produces high-tech vending machines; giant gumball machine.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A pilot who builds his own jet-powered glider; canoe makers in Montana; a knife maker in Washington; craftsmen keep alive the ancient art of weapon making; Skulls International in Oklahoma City; handmade special effects.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Lightning War
programme.desc: Country after European country falls before the unstoppable German blitzkrieg.

programme.title: Secret War: The Spymistress and the French Fiasco
programme.desc: After WWII, SOE disbanded, leaving Vera Atkins to uncover fates of 118 agents, including 13 women. Many were betrayed and sent to camps; some were executed. Atkins' quest continued, marked by personal impact and delayed recognition.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: Their attack on the Soviet Union having failed, the German Army suffers a series of counter-offensives on the Eastern Front. Wehrmacht's losses are huge as the Soviets advance West.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Colt M1911, designed by John Moses Browning, is the 20th century's most influential pistol. Its .45 ACP cartridge made it the U.S. military's standard for 75 years. Wil Willis tests it to explore its stopping power.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Nazis Outfought
programme.desc: By 1944, Hitler's image as a victorious leader is crumbling. He faces a bomb plot led by Stauffenberg and Tresckow, intending to kill him and overthrow the regime. Hitler survives the bombing, triggering a brutal reprisal against conspirators.

programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Freddie flytter ut
programme.desc: Freddie bestemmer seg for å flytte ut av leiligheten sin etter at moren hans har gjort ham flau. Carly, Sam og Freddie starter et firma og spesialiserer seg på bilder av kjæledyr.

programme.title: iCarly: iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: Når en hetebølge rammer Seattle og strømmen går, kommer Spencer til unnsetning med et norsk klimaanlegg.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: De medvirkende introduserer bloopers og bortklipte scener fra serien.

programme.title: iCarly: Rommet brenner
programme.desc: Spencer prøver å overraske Carly på bursdagen hennes, men ender opp med å brenne ned rommet hennes. Men når forsikringsselskapet gir ham en stor sjekk, har han sjansen til å gjøre det godt igjen.

programme.title: iCarly: Ja
programme.desc: Etter at en iCarly fan frir til kjæresten på nettshowet, blir gjengen nesten tvunget til å gå i bryllupet. Men når bruden får kalde føtter, må Carly komme til unnsetning.

programme.title: iCarly: T-skjortesalg
programme.desc: Gjengen begynner å selge Penny-skjorter, og når salget går susende, rekrutterer Sam barn fra 4. klasse for å bidra til å lage t-skjorter. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie er uenige om hvordan de skal behandles.

programme.title: iCarly: Rampestreker
programme.desc: Når hun blir ertet for aldri å ha funnet på en morsom spøk, rekrutterer Carly Spencer for å spøke med Sam og Freddie. Men etter at Spencer har fått sansen for det, kan han ikke slutte. Mob må finne en måte å stoppe ham på.

programme.title: iCarly: Moren til Sam
programme.desc: Etter å ha kranglet ned moren sin, flytter Sam inn til Carly, som snart innser at hun er en fryktelig gjest. Freddie blir forfulgt av en farlig kriminell etter å ha fanget ham på film da han begikk en forbrytelse.

programme.title: iCarly: Nevel trenger hjelp
programme.desc: Når en video av Nevel, som skriker til en liten jente, dukker opp på internett, blir Nevel hatet av alle. Men Nevel trygler iCarly-gjengen om hjelp for å redde sin ære.

programme.title: iCarly: Den kjekke assistenten
programme.desc: Carly og Sam ansetter en kjekk fyr som praktikant på nettshowet.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebeccas planer for en romantisk dag med Robin blir ødelagt når han velger å tilbringe dagen med å konkurrere mot Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla får stor skyldfølelse når hun skjuler pengene fra sin avdøde manns eiendom for den andre enken.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam, Cliff og Norm ydmyker seg selv når de feilaktig tror at rivalene deres på en annen bar har gjort Cheers til mål for enda en narrestrek.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody gir Kelly en løftering når faren ordner en tur til Europa for henne.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla frykter at Eddies ånd hjemsøker henne når hun bestemmer seg for å begynne å date igjen.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam mener at han endelig har lurt Rebecca til å tilbringe natten med ham, men til slutt får han vite hvem som egentlig blir lurt.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Etter at Robin ber Rebecca om å flytte sammen med ham, får hun vite at han har utnyttet henne i planene om å overta selskapet hennes.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam får tilbake eierskapet for baren samt en etterlengtet mulighet med Rebecca. Han overlater Robin til myndighetene for innsidehandel.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Scared Straight / Citizen Butt-head Part 2
programme.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea. / Beavis & Butt-head and President Clinton explore chaos theory together.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sporting goods / Cow tipping
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head decide to get athletic gear supporters for gym class / The duo venture out on a quest for cow tipping

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den rare jenta / Tidsreisen
programme.desc: Beavis møter en hemmelig beundrer på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head krysser frem og tilbake over delstatslinjen inn i Mountain Time Zone og tror de kan reise i tiden.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Zelda's boyfriend breaks up with her she cooks up a storm to drown her sorrows.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina gets an unexpected surprise when ex-boyfriend Derek stops by to say hello.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Competition
programme.desc: A friendly game of tennis turns into a battle of the sexes when Josh tells Sabrina that women are not as competitive as men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I, Busybody
programme.desc: Always willing to help others with their problems, whether they ask for it or not, Sabrina finds herself in a heap of trouble when her advice goes awry.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Guilty
programme.desc: When Sabrina uses a little magic to get Zelda nominated for an award, she has no idea what she's started.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Whole Ball of Wax
programme.desc: When Sabrina gets an eerie feeling that she is being followed, she decides to take matters into her own hands but ends up face-to-face with her mother Diana.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Driving Mr. Goodman
programme.desc: Sabrina persuades Miles Goodman to get his driver's license and finds herself in the middle of a nasty lawsuit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Fall to Pieces
programme.desc: When Hilda's boyfriend breaks up with her, she is devastated and claims that she is through with men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Total Sabrina Live
programme.desc: Sabrina’s search for a job takes her to NYC and the Mtelevision studios.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Big Head
programme.desc: Sabrina has to write about an obnoxious pop star, who threatens to sue the magazine unless she apologises! Plus, Roxie and Morgan try to train Salem.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Call Me Crazy
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to impress her colleagues but accidentally says far too much about her magical life, making everyone think that she's totally crazy.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Heartstrings - Part 2
programme.desc: The family anxiously awaits while Steven undergoes heart surgery.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Heartstrings - Part 3
programme.desc: Steven struggles with fear after returning home after his heart surgery.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Basic Training
programme.desc: Skippy decides to join the Army.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Deja Vu
programme.desc: Jennifer dates Mallory's ex-boyfriend's brother.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Nick's Best Friend
programme.desc: Nick is devastated when his childhood dog gets hit by a car.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Get Me to the Living Room on Time
programme.desc: Andy befriends two senior citizens from a retirement center.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Job Not Taken
programme.desc: Alex must choose between a friendship and his career.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Wrecker's Ball
programme.desc: Elyse races to save a building she designed from the wrecking ball.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: Skippy falls for Alex's girlfriend, Lauren, when he begins counseling her.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bone Thugs And Homeless
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en hund som plager en nyhetsreporter og Harriet Tubman som løper fritt omkring.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Landlord
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen vil president Obama behandles som alle andre, Jordan ser på en leilighet som er eid av en mistenksom utleier, og et par festfiksere som vil få gang i festen på en bar mitzvah.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: Kileleking mellem to venner blir plutselig merkelig, forfattere brainstormer til 'Gremlins 2', to bøller mistenker vennen sin for å stjele og Keegan og Jordan diskuterer Afrika på en fest.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Biological Dad
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer et romvesen som lærer om kvinnelig anatomi, karer som prøver å overgå hverandre og møtet mellom de to siste mennesker på Jorden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Y'all Ready For This?
programme.desc: Et fotballag girer seg opp før en kamp, president Obama og Luther møter Hillary Clinton, to karer forbereder seg på potensielle trusler på et fly, pirater synger en sang og en betjent er litt for skyteglad.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en narkohandel som går på trynet, en mafiafyr som er en stor grinasabb, og Darius Rucker som prøver å takle sin Hootie-fortid.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan feirer Halloween med å flykte fra rasistiske zombier, skuespillerne i 'Human Centipede' har en skremmende gjenforening, og vi besøker en folkeskole for trollmenn med problemer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Killer Concept Album
programme.desc: En politiker benekter å ha sendt rampete bilder, en detektiv forhører en rapper, Cedric og Levi finner lyn i en flaske, to herrer fra sør komplimenterer kvinner, Jordan møter en gammel venn og en betjent tar tingene helt bokstavelig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East West Bowl #2
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en introdukjson av de nyeste East/West Bowl-spillerne, utleier-Devon ransaker Jordans leilighet, og Jordan blir støtt av en overseksuell kollega.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Detective
programme.desc: En respektert kriminalbetjent, ekspert i sexforbrytelser, benytter ukonvensjonelle metoder for å løse en sak, en actionhelt redder kjæresten sin og en ansatt i en butikk med yoghurt-is tester for mange vareprøver.

programme.title: Key & Peele: I'm Retired
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en ungkars-fest som blir underlig og en svart fyr med en hvit penis.

programme.title: Broad City: Hashtag FOMO
programme.desc: Jentene leter etter den perfekte fest, noe som avslører en underlig og surrealistisk side av Abbi, som igjen bekrefter Ilanas verste anelser.

programme.title: Broad City: Citizen Ship
programme.desc: Gjengen skal feire at Jaime har blitt amerikansk statsborger, men Bevers fører Abbi og Ilana på avveier med å love dem gratis sprit. Imens må Lincoln og Jaime klare seg selv blandt alle advokatene.

programme.title: Broad City: Coat Check
programme.desc: Abbi prøver å finne en forsvunnet frakk, mens Ilana utforsker en ny romanse - som føles merkelig kjent.

programme.title: Broad City: St. Mark's
programme.desc: Når jentene feirer Ilanas 23. fødselsdag, blir de avbrudt av en rømt tenåring som fører dem ut på en vill jakt rundt i St. Mark's Place.

programme.title: Broad City: Two Chainz
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana opplever store klesuhell på vei til en venns utstilling og legger ut på en desperat jakt etter et offentlig toalett.

programme.title: Broad City: Co-Op
programme.desc: Abbi må late som om hun er Ilana for å ta hennes skift på jobben, mens Ilana drar til Long Island pga en svært viktig legetime.

programme.title: Broad City: Game Over
programme.desc: Ilana får en ny mulighet på Deals, Deals, Deals, og Abbi prøver å holde konkurranseinstinktet i sjakk på Soulstice Games Day.

programme.title: Broad City: Rat Pack
programme.desc: Etter å ha mottatt en heftig regning for skadedyrsbekjempelse, holder Jaime og Ilana en fest for å dekke kostnadene. I mellomtiden drar Abbi ut på tokt for å møte nye mennesker.

programme.title: Broad City: 2016
programme.desc: Ilana finner sitt nye kall, og Abbi må innom det mest fryktede sted i verden: biltilsynet.

programme.title: Broad City: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana drar til Philly for å besøke Abbis barndomshjem . Når Abbi innser at hun gjorde en stor tabbe på videregående, drar hun og Ilana på forsoningsoppdrag.

programme.title: Broad City: B&B-NYC
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana legger ut leilighetene sine på B & B-NYC for å tjene litt ekstra penger.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Burning Man Festival
programme.desc: When the Sheriff's Department receives $1200 to get people off the streets, Garcia helps a hooker, and Dangle heads to Burning Man.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Moving Day
programme.desc: Dangle needs help moving out of his house, and Junior teaches Reno's youth about prison life.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Terrorist Training Pt. 1
programme.desc: The Office of Homeland Security teaches the Reno Sheriff's Department terrorist attack protocol, and Clemmy's mom gets into trouble.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Terrorist Training Pt. 2
programme.desc: The Reno Sherriff's Department passes their Homeland Security exam with flying colors, and Clemmy and a drunk driver discover some new moves.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween, the deputies prepare for a night of mayhem, and Wiegel sets a sting operation to catch mischievous teens.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Promotion
programme.desc: Dangle gets a new job in Carson City, but the deputies are too wrapped up in women's basketball to give him a proper send-off.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Wiegel's new boyfriend, Craig, bears an uncanny resemblance to the Truckee River Serial Killer.

programme.title: RENO 911!: British Law
programme.desc: Inspector Martin Smiley of the U.K. joins the Reno Sheriff's Department in an exchange program.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Wife Visits
programme.desc: Divorce looms over Dangle and his estranged wife, and the rest of the department struggles with a giant Ten Commandments monument.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Religion in Reno
programme.desc: The Reverend Gigg LeCarp, Reno's favorite televangelist, saves the deputies in their very own jail.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park & Making da Band
programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp & The Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave reveals sketches that are too hot for television.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations & NY Boobs
programme.desc: Great New York boobs get awards, and Dave predicts reparations chaos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World & Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Nintendo 64 Kid
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på Nintendo 64-guttens nettoppreisning, rollerblade-tabber og det ekleste du noensinne har sett på tv.

programme.title: Tosh.0: November 5, 2009 - Trampled Cheerleader
programme.desc: Nazis play frisbee, Daniel answers Twitter questions about celebrities, and the Trampled Cheerleader gets a Web Redemption.

programme.title: Tosh.0: November 12, 2009 - Ladder Fail Guy
programme.desc: The Accordion Kid masters a discipline that no one wants to listen to, Daniel prevails in arm wrestling, and Todd Glass suffers through lemonade-boarding.

programme.title: Tosh.0: How To Get European Men
programme.desc: I premieren på sesong 4 prater Daniel om det som har skjedd i pausen og lærer om hvordan man møter europeiske menn - og programmet får en ny programleder.

programme.title: Tosh.0: How to Draw Guy
programme.desc: En elendig kunstner får oppreisning, Daniel leger en video 'Til abortens ende' og tar avskjed med fotballsesongen.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Haboob Wedding
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper et par med å få bryllupsoppreisning, trener og får hjelp til å skrive sitt testamente.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Mustang Kid
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper Mustang-fyren med å få opreisning, teller opp hvilke kvinner over 40 han ville ligge med og spiller en ny versjon av stein, saks og papir.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Bad Breakdancer
programme.desc: En dårlig breakdanser får oppreisning og Daniel feirer Black History Month.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Worst Sketch Group
programme.desc: Daniel behandler emnet mobbing og auksjonerer ut kuriosa fra 'Tosh.0' - og den dårligste sketsjgruppen får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Parkour Girl
programme.desc: Daniel går tilbake til 'Shark Tank' og parkour-jenta får oppreisning.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: It’s a game of messy politics when Caroline will not endorse a local councilman, who is inspired by her comic strip, while Del conjures up a promotional campaign.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Discreetly planning to ease Caroline’s homesick holiday blues, Richard (Malcolm Gets) goes to great lengths to get a gift for Caroline that inspires suspicion in Julia (Sofia Milos) and sleuthing from Caroline and Annie.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Informed by Annie (Amy Pietz) of Caroline’s (LeaThompson) unspoken love for him, Richard (Malcolm Gets) confronts Caroline, who tells him that it’s a thing of the past.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is tapped as a celebrity guest star for a quiz show, her jitters prompt Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help her study, much to Julia’s (Sofia Milos) chagrin.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to convince an insecure Del(Eric Lutes) that he has the potential to be a great parent after Del is shocked to discover that he is the father of a 10-year old girl.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Julia (Sofia Milos) tells Caroline (Lea Thompson) that it’s not easy being on the outside of her close working relationship with Richard (Malcolm Gets), Caroline quickly, and mysteriously, learns what it’s like to walk a mile in Julia’s shoes.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline (Lea Thompson) struggles with commitment issues over Trevor, Richard(Malcolm Gets) inadvertently causes a rift between Caroline and her new beau.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: As Elaine nears a decision on her future, the cabbies reminisce about those glorious things that "might have been" had fate not sent them down that treacherous road to the Sunshine Cab Co.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Parenes troskap settes på prøve idet en ny deltager sjekker inn. På Solo kommer det inn et brev med et hemmelig oppdrag som snur opp-ned på hele hotellet.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Det er klart for sesongens første parseremoni. Spillet er i gang for fullt og slue planer legges. En mystisk gjest sjekker inn på Perla.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Mayoo har inntatt rollen som rektor mens inspektøren følger nøye med i det parene må opp til eksamen. Hvilken jente blir satt i fare som følge av manglende kunnskap?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: En upopulær handling under eksamen skaper splid i den ene alliansen. De «dummeste» på hotellet skal på date med den nye jenta, som må ta et vanskelig valg.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Skolen er ikke for alle og eksamensstresset fører til eksplosiv stemning på festen. Pass på hva du sier bak andres rygg, for du vet aldri hvem som sitter på makten på Paradise Hotel.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: To gjester får et oppdrag som får store konsekvenser for kveldens dramatiske parseremoni. Et mørke legger seg over hotellet. Hvem tør å sove på sitt eget rom?

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 904
programme.desc: Positivitetsblogger Petter ønsker å bo nærmere sentrum, men klarer Karianne å finne den perfekte guttebula? Camilla og Jon Erik trenger mer plass og får hjelp av Hans Christian.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 905
programme.desc: Iselinn og Ron er helt uenige om hvor de vil bo. Klarer Karianne å løse en tilnærmet umulig oppgave? Gårdsguttene Kim og Ole Johnny er på jakt etter et idyllisk gårdsbruk med skog og egen strandlinje.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 906
programme.desc: Karianne får et viktig oppdrag med å hjelpe alenemamma Samia i hus før mammapermisjonen er over – men holder budsjettet? Hans Christian møter Johanna og Joakim som er på jakt etter drømmehagen.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1001
programme.desc: Ingrid bor på leilighetshotell med sine to barn, og er desperat etter å få en ny start, og skape et hjem sammen med familien. Småbarnsforeldrene Toril og Eivind vil ut av leiligheten sin i Oslo-gryta.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1002
programme.desc: Lise og Damien blir snart tobarnsforeldre og vil ut av bykjernen og ned på bakkeplan. Cecilia starter i ny jobb i Trondheim om to uker, men har ikke hatt tid til å gå på visninger.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1003
programme.desc: Ole Jørgen og Gina er førstegangskjøpere på begrenset budsjett, og drømmer om en fredfull og landlig enebolig til seg og kattene. Oda og Simon har noen spesielle utfordringer med sin nåværende bolig.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 427
programme.desc: Det er serveringsdag på Camp Kulinaris. Ukas tema er helt vilt, en krevende meny med mye finesse og avanserte teknikker. Terje er fortsatt på sykehuset så restaurantsjef Benedicte er nervøs før kvelden.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 502
programme.desc: Kjartan kommer på årets første menysmaking. Nervene (og flammene) står i taket, og restaurantsjef Christopher mottar uønsket hjelp fra Linda.

programme.title: Jul med Camp Kulinaris: Episode 101
programme.desc: I første episode er det Christopher Husby, Kathrine Sørland, Linni Meister og Leif Einar Lothe som skal gjennom spennende konkurranser på kjøkkenet hos Kjartan. Her skal de få utfordret smaksløkene sine og få tips om en ny måte å bruke restene på.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 632
programme.desc: Tre spente deltakere står klare for årets semifinale. Kjartan tester deltakerne i presisjon, teknikk og hurtighet, før den første finalisten kåres. Sesongens siste duell avgjør hvem som blir den siste finalisten.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 331
programme.desc: To nye konkurranser venter, og teknikk og god hukommelse blir avgjørende. Nok en gang må en deltaker forlate Portør.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1108
programme.desc: Svein prøver å imponere Lillian med en egenkomponert veganmiddag. Lars og teatervennene drar på Volvo-verksted, mens Håkon skal prøve seg som drag-queen, til Bibbis store begeistring.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1111
programme.desc: Iselin og Jørgen prøver seg på hinderløype til vanns. Onkel Erling og Stein Are har endelig kommet fram etter lastebilturen, men det tar ikke lang tid før et nytt problem dukker opp.

programme.title: Charterfeber
programme.desc: Per Sandberg ankommer og ender i karaoke-duett med Svein. Roger fortsetter jakten på CD-er, mens landkrabbene fra Harstad søker spenning i det våte element. Fred Åge havner i dartduell mot en brite.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1123
programme.desc: Bibbi og Svein fortsetter daten sin, og får selskap av noen innpåslitne kameler. Jane og gjengen er på marked. Stein Are og onkel Erling imponerer på kjøkkenet med klassikeren Toro-ertesuppe.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 913
programme.desc: Hilde er fremdeles optimist på at hun skal tjene inn penger til basseng hjemme i Norge, og prøver seg denne gangen som massør på stranden.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1101
programme.desc: I første episode treffer vi Aurora, som har med seg mamma Bibbi på tur. Stein Are fra Harstad-familien har tatt med seg onkel Erling på guttetur og vi blir kjent med Cathrin, og hennes lillebror Odin.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 609
programme.desc: Denne gangen er det fisk på menyen. På øya Frei utenfor Kristiansund møter vi familien Furseth og deres gamle klippfiskbrygge. Her får Halvor vist frem både kreativiteten og kokkekunnskapene sine.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 610
programme.desc: Ved innsjøen Tyin ligger hytta til Benedicte og Jon Olav idyllisk til. Denne gangen blir det store endringer både ute og inne, og gutta får prøvd seg på nye kreative løsninger og hemmelige rom.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 701
programme.desc: Gutta tar turen til idylliske Nesdal innerst i Lodalen, der de skal forvandle en storgård til et lunt sommersted. Halvor viser hvordan små grep kan gi stor forandring, og Ole får et byggeprosjekt nede ved vannet.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 702
programme.desc: Denne gangen går turen til vakre Os utenfor Bergen. Hytta trenger sårt en stilforandring, og her får gutta virkelig vist seg fra sin kreative side. De snur opp ned på dagens planløsning og lager morsomme utemøbler.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 703
programme.desc: Foreholmen er en skjult perle i Flekkefjord kommune. En mørk hytte forvandles til et lyst sommerparadis. Gutta viser hvordan man kan fornye et kjøkken uten å kjøpe nytt, og det bygges en stor deilig platting.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 704
programme.desc: Gutta skal til eksotiske Sommarøy utenfor Tromsø for å gjøre om et gammelt fjøs til et lekkert feriehus på Ibiza. Halvor lager lampe av stråhatter, og både Ole og Torkel har kreative prosjekter med gamle materialer.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2301
programme.desc: Ingolf fra Malm i Trøndelag har på det meste eid hele seks biler samtidig – og har brukt ufattelig store beløp på sin store hobby. Kan Cecilie Tvetenstrand og Hallgeir Kvadsheim klare å rydde opp i Ingolfs rotete privatøkonomi og inkassokrav?

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2302
programme.desc: Gry og Glenn fra Veitvet i Oslo elsker å dra på turer med danskebåten og spise på restaurant. Men ekteparet har levd fullstendig over evne, og økonomiekspertene finner raskt ut at paret aldri har samarbeidet om økonomien.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2303
programme.desc: Ida Helene fra Harestua klarer aldri å holde et budsjett og går i minus hver eneste måned. Bare ett år etter at hun kjøpte leiligheten hun og datteren bor i, står hun i fare for å miste den. Klarer Lene og Hallgeir å redde boligen?

programme.title: Luksusfellen
programme.desc: Daniel fra Siggerud fikk sitt første kredittkort som 17-åring og er siden blitt nedsyltet i gjeld. Kjæresten hans, Pia, håper at Magne og Hallgeir kan klare å ordne opp i Daniels gjeldskaos.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2305
programme.desc: Renate bor på en gård i Svarstad sammen med barna sine og hunden. Hun har pådratt seg mye kredittkortgjeld og sliter med seks betalingsanmerkninger og lønnstrekk. Klarer Magne og Lene å få redusert gjelden?

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2306
programme.desc: Pengene til 27-åringen Ole André, som bor på Haslum, går unna til dyr elektronikk og gaming. Han kjøpte også like godt en Tesla på impuls. Kan Lene og Hallgeir hjelpe han med å få styr på økonomien?

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Jimmy og Timmy blir medlemmer av gjengen The Crips, som de tror er en klubb for funksjonshemmede.

programme.title: South Park: Osama Bin Laden har fjertebukser
programme.desc: Guttene blir ved et uhell sendt til Afghanistan og møter Osama og Taliban. De oppdager at de har overraskende mye til felles med de afghanske barna.

programme.title: South Park: Pupper og drager
programme.desc: Dørene til kjøpesenteret skal endelig åpnes for det største 'Svartefredagsalget' i historien. Gutta er uenige om hvilket spillutstyr de skal kjøpe, og et blodig slag vil avgjøre om Xbox eller Sony blir vinneren.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankeys juleklassikere

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Foderplats

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt På Ringduva

programme.title: South Park: Kyllingelskeren
programme.desc: Barbrady ber guttene om hjelp til å løse en sak, og Cartman lar seg rive med av sin nye autoritet.

programme.desc: Stan vil finne opprinnelsen til malte påskeegg og oppdager en hemmelighet om den katolske kirken.
