programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark rescue victims trapped in a car, thanks to a helpful dog.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A man whose son died in Vietnam learns that he has an Amerasian grandson.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A children's-show host has a warm-hearted TV persona but is actually a cynic at heart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Another angel is upset that Jonathan has been assigned to find a mate for his widow.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Bickering couples go on a trip to learn what it was that brought them together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work to keep the three couples together.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison får en mindre hjernerystelse når hun sklir i badekaret. Når hun skal ta en MR, har hun en merkelig visjon om en mann hun nettopp har møtt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har problemer med å være upartisk i en sak når hun utvikler morsfølelser for en tenåringsgutt som er anklaget for å ha drept sin tidligere sjef.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison hjelper statsadvokaten med å finne en nær venns savnede bror. Hun blir paranoid om antiterroragenter fra regjeringen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer at broren hennes var involvert i et lokalt bankran. Mistankene hennes vokser når han uventet dukker opp i byen og blir involvert med en svindler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison etterforsker tilsynelatende tilfeldige drap, og setter familien hennes i fare. Bridgette må holde en presentasjon om morens jobb for klassen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tre jenter blir funnet drept. Allisons syner kobler etterforsker Scanlon til saken.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian's biological father Ethan returns to town with a new wife, intending to take the children away from Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian run away to keep their father from taking them away from Dr. Mike and Sully. After they are found, it's discovered Colleen has developed pneumonia. Dr. Mike realizes she has to let them go to save them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town puts on a production of Romeo and Juliet. Brian tries to learn what love is so he can write a paper for school.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike convinces Robert E to take a job fixing a train boiler, then finds out it is a dangerous job.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A teenage Belle Star robs the saloon with the Younger brothers and is shot. Dr. Mike takes her home in an effort to show her a real home life, attempting to turn her from her life of crime.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2413
programme.desc: Nikki (24) bor med sin kjæreste, hund og hamster. Hun er arbeidsløs og drømmer om en fremtid som YouTubestjerne. Nikki sløser enorme menger på sitt utsende.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2414
programme.desc: Magnus (53) bor på Sollentuna med sin kjæreste og hennes to barn. Han jobber som prosjektleder og drømmer om å flytte til Thailand. Selv om han har en bra lønn så går han i minus 12.900 hver måned.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2415
programme.desc: Peder (50) bor i en en-roms leilighet i Älta. Selv med en inntekt på 32.000kr i måneden går han i minus 14.100kr i måneden. Hans gjeld har blitt over 700.000kr.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2501
programme.desc: Emmie og Mikel fra Bjärnum er det unge paret som har nesten hele sitt hjem på avbetaling, selv sin nyinnkjøpte valp. Paret drømmer om å kjøpe hus og gifte seg, men de har ikke engang råd til husleien.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2502
programme.desc: Elias er en utseendefiksert fyr som brenner ekstreme summer penger på ulike skjønnhetsbehandlinger og utekvelder. Han spiser ute, heller i seg store mengder med energidrikker og røyker hver dag.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2503
programme.desc: Den unge moren Josefin fra Täby er både shopoholic og gamblingmisbruker. Med nesten 1,5 millioner i gjeld, blir det en tøff uke for Magnus og Patrik.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 116
programme.desc: Den koseligste dagen i året er her: Julaften. Julia drar hjem til Milano og Björn for å kunne tilbringe hele dagen med sønnen.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 117
programme.desc: Julen er endelig over og Natalie er fullstendig utslitt. Barnehagen er stengt og hun er opptatt med å prøve å underholde tre små jenter.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 118
programme.desc: Lina har lenge drømt om å putte fillers i leppene. Hun er ekstremt redd for smerte og er usikker på om hun er i stand til å takle det.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 119
programme.desc: Lina har fått nok av alle prekenene om hvordan en mor skal være og ikke være. En av hennes største interesser er skjønnhet, og hun får ofte høre om hvordan hun prioriterer feil.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 120
programme.desc: I den siste episoden er det på tide å starte 2017 og legge 2016 bak oss. Våre mødre ser tilbake på høydepunktene fra året som har gått.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 201
programme.desc: I den første episoden møter vi de nye mødrene LoveJoy med datteren Hailey, og Julia M med datteren Nanja.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 202
programme.desc: Julia M og Johan forteller om deres brokete bakgrunn og om hvorfor Johan havnet i fengsel. Natalie lurer på om hun skal bruke sparepengene sine på brystforstørrelse eller på en ny baby.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 203
programme.desc: Julia B prater om livet med Milan i et radiointervju. Lovejoy bader Hailey og forteller at hun ikke vil at Hailey skal ha en lignende barndom som hun selv hadde.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 204
programme.desc: Julia B vil se sommerfresh ut og bestemmer seg for å ta spraytan, men Milan synes ikke det er like gøy og gjør alt for å rømme derfra.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 205
programme.desc: Vi får bli med på Lovejoy Bäcklund og Rasmus rottejakt i huset. Julia Mindell og Johan skal signere en kontrakt for den nye leiligheten.

programme.title: Things We Lost In The Fire
programme.desc: En nybakt enke inviterer sin manns plagede bestevenn til å bo hos henne og sine to barn. Mens han gradvis får orden på livet sitt, hjelper han familien med å takle og konfrontere tapet.

programme.title: Vampire In Brooklyn
programme.desc: Som vampyren Maximillian er den populære stjernen den mest djevelske, kjekkeste og absolutt vandøde fyren i nabolaget.

programme.title: Harlem Nights
programme.desc: Tre generasjoner med legendariske komikere spiller i denne historien om nattblubbeieren Sugar Ray (Richard Pryor) og sønnen hans Quick (Eddie Murphy), som kjemper for å hindre en ondskapsfull gangster og en korrupt politistyrke i å stenge klubben.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: En tidligere fange tar en jobb som langdistansesjåfør for en lastebil. Lastebilen er imidlertid fylt med våpen, og han må kjempe for å redde familien sin og overleve.

programme.title: Mean Guns
programme.desc: Heller enn å drepe sine fiender, finner en gangsterboss på en mer kreativ løsning. Han bestemmer seg for å låse alle inn i et fengsel og gir dem våpen og lar dem drepe hverandre. Kampen står om en premie på 10 millioner dollar til de siste vinnerne.

programme.title: Texas Rangers
programme.desc: Etter borgerkrigen, var Texas prisgitt morderiske banditter. En gruppe usannsynlige helter kommer for å kjempe mot de frafalne kjeltringene. Overmannet samler de mot til å beskytte de uskyldige og rette opp i det som er galt i deres elskede hjemland.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: Steve Dallas (Owen Wilson) og hans bestevenn Ben Bakers (Zach Galifianakis) reiser til Bens barndomshjem etter hans fars død. Der oppdager de at Ben har arvet familiens formue, men må kjempe mot sin søster og 25 år gamle stemor for å beholde den.

programme.title: Henrys Crime
programme.desc: Henry (KEANU REEVES) har ingen ambisjoner og sover seg gjennom livet. Men en morgen han uvitende blir deltager i et dårlig gjennomført bankran, får han en oppvåkning, og tar på seg straffen. I fengselet blir han venn med Max (JAMES CAAN).

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: For de fleste er begravelser bare noe man ønsker å få overstått, og hvis det var opp til Daniel ville han hoppet over dagen hvor hans far skulle gravlegges. Hvordan skal han klare å skrive et minneord som vil leve opp til det..

programme.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby: Them
programme.desc: Engang var Conor og Eleanor lykkelig gift. Nå føler de seg fremmed for hverandre, og i kjølevannet av en tragisk hendelse lengter de etter å finne tilbake til det liv og den kjærligheten de engang hadde.

programme.title: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: Josie vender tilbake til den lille hjembyen sin da hun uventet blir verge for niesen og nevøen sin. Der møter hun Cooper, kjæresten fra high school.

programme.title: Worth
programme.desc: Etter angrepene på World Trade Center og Pentagon utnevner kongressen advokaten Kenneth Feinberg til å lede erstatningsfondet for ofrene. Feinberg står overfor en umulig oppgave - å bestemme hvor mye et liv er verdt.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: When Hope Calls Christmas
programme.desc: Brookfield er valgt av et nasjonalt magasin til å bli omtalt for sin juleånd, og innbyggerne slår seg sammen for å gjøre samfunnet deres til et jule-eventyrland.

programme.title: Christmas in Pine Valley
programme.desc: Natalie eier et såpefirma som hun driver med vennene sine. En dag sender et stort magasin en reporter for å skrive en artikkel om selskapet til Natalie, i troen på at det er en familiebedrift.

programme.title: Joy for Christmas
programme.desc: Når familiebedriftens årlige julekjøring er i fare, må Holly overbevise proffidrettsutøveren Jack Kane om å være det offentlige ansiktet til kampanjen for å redde den

programme.title: Urban Cowboy
programme.desc: A West Texas farm boy goes to the big city where he rides a mechanical bull, meets his future wife, and encounters the antagonism of an ex-con

programme.title: Peace, Love & Misunderstanding
programme.desc: ”Peace, Love & Misunderstanding” er et hjertevarmt portrett av en fargerik familie. Det som var ment bare å være en helgtur endrer seg raskt til å bli et sommereventyr fylt med romantikk, familiehemmeligheter, og det som trengs for å være lykkelig.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Country-sangerinnen Charlotte vender tilbake til Tennessee før hun gifter seg. Når hun møter ungdomskjærligheten, blir noe levende og hun stiller spørsmål ved alt.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror
programme.desc: En av de best kjente skrekkhistoriene basert på ekte hendelser. Ryan Reynolds og Melissa George spiller i denne intense og skremmende omstarten fra blockbuster-produsent Michael Bay.

programme.title: Children Of The Corn V: Fields Of Terror
programme.desc: Seks college-studenter tar en veldig feil vending, og går seg bort i en merkelig forlatt landsby som styres av en morderisk kult med barn kontrollert av onde krefter i dette femte kapittelet i den populere film-franchisen.

programme.title: The Ring Two
programme.desc: Når det kommer fram en mystisk, umerket videokassett på et lokalt åsted, forstår Rachel at Samara er tilbake og mer bestemt enn noensinne på å fortsette sin ustoppelige terror.

programme.title: Walking Tall
programme.desc: Basert på livet til sheriffen Buford Pusser fra Tennessee ryddet opp på egen hånd i kriminalitet og korrupsjon i sin lille by, men på bekostning av familielivet og nesten sitt eget liv.

programme.title: Dick Dynamite 1944
programme.desc: Mot slutten av krigen planlegger nazister å gjøre New Yorks befolkning til zombier. Bare DICK DYNAMITE kan stoppe dem – drap er hans jobb, og i ’44 går forretningene strålende.

programme.title: Bullet Ballet
programme.desc: Når Godas kjæreste begår selvmord, synker han i depresjon. En kveld blir han overfalt av en gategjeng, men fascineres av en kvinne drevet av dødslyst. Han søker hevn, finner en pistol og trekkes inn i et gjengkrig.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 201
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Michela som skammer seg så over brystene sine at hun gjemmer seg i store hettegensere, og føler seg nesten som en gutt.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 102
programme.desc: Møt Christina som ikke fikk de struttende silikonbrystene hun alltid hadde drømt om. Møt også Nicole, som lever med smerter hver dag.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 906
programme.desc: Mia føler at hun etter flere operasjoner ser ut som en som har fire bryster. Magen til Alice blir større og større, og hun sliter med magesyre og smerter. Kan legene hjelpe dem?

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 403
programme.desc: Vi møter Charlotte, som skammer seg over silikonbrystene sine.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 807
programme.desc: I 2010 dro Tina til Thailand for å få byttet ut brystimplantatene sine, men operasjonen gikk ikke som forventet, og i dag sitter hun igjen med smerter som hemmer henne.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 507
programme.desc: For 10 år siden fikk Michelle fjernet en godartet cyste bak høyre øye. Operasjonen fører til at øyelokket henger løst over øyet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 701
programme.desc: I det nordlige vinterlandskapet må Anton stoppe transporten av et tungt toglokomotiv når tilhengeren går i stykker. Elin, en melkebilsjåfør, starter dagen rolig, helt til en melkeslange ryker og kaos oppstår.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 702
programme.desc: For Denkan fra Göteborg blir transporten et mareritt. Etter å ha reparert en lekk bremseklokke blinker lysene rødt. Bremsene overopphetes, og han må skynde seg dit med et brannslukningsapparat.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 703
programme.desc: Kellys stressende dag blir verre når det viser seg at flere bedrifter holder stengt på grunn av ferien. Emina må rekke en fotballkamp, men det blir full stopp hos den første kunden da hun ikke kommer seg inn på lageret.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 704
programme.desc: Når Roine laster okser, nekter de å gå opp på lastebilen. Og det er ikke lett å få okser på 1100 kg til å adlyde. Emina leverer fisk i sommervarmen, men havner bak saktegående feriegjester.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 705
programme.desc: Tove dekker opp for vikarer som har sommerferie og jobber derfor på dagtid. De nye arbeidstidene i det sommerlige Småland byr på andre problemer enn vanlig.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 706
programme.desc: Kranfører Carl har blitt bedt om å flytte en havnekran som veier nesten 200 tonn og er 33 meter høy. Men arbeidet må brått avbrytes fordi det er fare for at kranen kan velte når en del mangler.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The competition takes its toll on one of the models as her insecurities cause her to burst into tears when she looks in the mirror.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Experts stress health and physical fitness with the models, and a nasty incident involving two of the girls and some baked goods leads to confrontation and a divided house.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: One model shares a playful kiss with another, and some of the girls become frantic after getting lost while en route to see New York's top fashion designers.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: At a photo shoot with live tarantulas, one model's phobia of spiders overwhelms her

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls must test their acting skills by performing alongside Taye Digg.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are taken to a tea house to learn the ancient technique of a proper tea ceremony

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Femte uke
programme.desc: Under treningsleirens femte uke er Kelly uvel. Teknisk sjef Kitty Carter, stiller opp og kjører ukens første øvelser. Kitty praktiserer nulltoleranse og tilkaller de som har rotete numre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Treningsleirens syvende uke begynner med en øvelse på Cowboys' stadion. Kelli og Judy er klare for den endelige prøven, og kveldens omgang kan bestemme hvem som når laget..

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Kunngjøring av laget
programme.desc: Det er på tide å kunngjøre DCC-laget, men først skal Kelli og Judy teste kandidatene i en endelig feltøvelse på Cowboys' stadion. Spenningen stiger blant jentene, og Kelli og Judy betrakter hvert eneste trinn.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: En stor prestasjon
programme.desc: Laget har sin første kampdagopptreden bakom seg, men etter en dårlig øvelse advarer Kelli sitt nye lag om at hun kommer til å droppe de som ikke gir hundre prosent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Badedraktkalender
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders tar pause fra sidelinjen, og drar til Mexico for bilder til sin årlige badedraktkalender. Det er en utmattende uke for både jentene og armadaen av fotografer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Første hjemmekamp
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng er i fullt dansemodus og forbereder seg for sesongens første ordinære hjemmekamp. Kelli og Judy vil ha koreografien perfekt og presse jentene med intense øveldser.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Sister Jane Hawksworth is managing the ambulance arrivals, ‘It’s so unpredictable and you can have the worst day ever and think nothing can compare to it and then come back and have another worst day ever. And then gradually the days will get better.’

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: It’s another busy shift at Barnsley Hospital’s casualty department. Sister Jane Hawksworth is delighted to receive a delivery of chocolates from a grateful patient and shares them with the team.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: We spend an eventful night shift with Barnsley Hospital’s casualty team. The department is already busy when Paramedics rush in 74-year-old Barry who’s struggling to breathe.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: A busy night shift at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department has left the new team clocking on with an abundance of patients and a shortage of beds.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: Paramedics bring in Gary, a 28-year-old who came off his motorbike at 40 mph. However, injuries he sustained a few days earlier are of as much concern to Consultant Dr Rob Jones.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 8
programme.desc: 79-year-old Joyce moved into her dream home in Liverpool nearly 40 years ago with her partner, Norman. But when he passed away, she lost her battle to keep on top of the hoarding behavior she inherited from her mum.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 9
programme.desc: What happens when a hoarder can no longer live safely in their home and the family are left to pick up the pieces? House clearance experts Ange and Yvonne have been called in by the daughters of a lifelong hoarder to clear their dad’s house.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode we meet 63-year-old Jane, a retired nurse from Southeast London. Jane’s inability to start a family brought on her hoarding tendencies and 27 years later, her 2 bedroomed terrace home is full to the rafters with furniture and books.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this brand-new series of Dirty Home Rescue, Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Toni from Telford whose house is so dirty her partner of 10 years, Rich, won’t move in with her.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 2
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Bill and Antionette from Newport, who share their home with their 3 cats. They admit they’ve not deep cleaned their home since they moved in.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. It's a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim has to rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Simon has to grapple with a juggernaut that has skidded off the M62 and down a steep bank, but when they finally manage to pull it back onto the carriageway, it starts leaking diesel.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A broken-down coach on a slip road of the motorway presents a major problem for Crouch recovery op Jon and Highways England. Recovery Op Marta and Tez work together to solve a serious weight issue on her trailer load.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Crane operator Nick is called out to do an unusual job of removing two old cabins and replacing them with new ones. With each cabin weighing at least 4 tons and overhead electrical cables to negotiate, this is a highly hazardous job.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Dasher, Riley, and Fosse

programme.desc: A Hollywood couple had to turn down work because their French bulldog failed the Doggy Daycare entrance exam. Three Jack Russells began to fight each other when their owner got a serious boyfriend.

programme.desc: Cesar shows mail carriers in Roswell, Georgia, how to deal with close encounters of the four-legged kind. Next, Cesar meets a pair of Pomeranians that flip out when left alone.

programme.desc: An adopted miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles, four French bulldogs revolt against their owner, and an abused lab/chow/shepherd mix needs help accepting love.

programme.desc: Kristin sliter med å gå videre etter Brody. Audrina møter på Justin og begynner å tvile på sitt forhold til Ryan. Lo blir venn med Brodys nye kjæreste.

programme.title: The Hills: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: Brodys nye flamme gjør en fiende av Kristin når hun tar med seg en gammel rival av Kristins på en fest. Ryan kommer tilbake fra turneen, men Audrina forteller ham ikke at hun møtte Justin mens han var borte.

programme.title: The Hills: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place
programme.desc: Audrinas forhold til Ryan blir satt på prøve når han møter Justin for første gang. Brody er på Kristins side når Allie krangler med henne. Stephanie har en skuffende andre date.

programme.title: The Hills: Break-Up to Make-Up
programme.desc: Akkurat da Audrina avslutter ting med Ryan, overrasker Justin henne på bursdagen hennes. McKaelas venn Allie lager mer trøbbel med Kristin. Brody forteller Justin hva han tenker.

programme.title: The Hills: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: På en surfetur til Costa Rica, gjør Kristin Brody sjalu ved å rote med en lokal bartender, Audrina prøver å bekjempe hennes tiltrekning til Justin, og Stephanie finner seg selv på kant med jungelmiljøet.

programme.title: The Hills: Loves Me Not
programme.desc: Kristin har en åpenthjertig samtale med Brody, hun ønsker å gi forholdet en ny sjanse. Heidis mor kommer til LA, i håp om å forsone seg med henne. Lo og kjæresten hennes feirer sitt jubileum, og Stephanie begynner å date en ny.

programme.title: The Hills: All Good Things...
programme.desc: Kristin står overfor en stor avgjørelse som også påvirker Brody. Audrina slår opp med Justin. Lo vet ikke om hun er klar til å ta neste skritt med hennes kjæreste og Stephanie mener hun har endelig funnet sann lykke.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Hold Grudges... JK!
programme.desc: Det er en ny begynnelse for den ikoniske vennegruppen da de kommer tilbake til The Hills og tar opp kontakten etter mange år. Nye utfordringer, gamle feider og romanser kolliderer. Fortiden er nemlig ikke alltid i fortiden.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Not My Family
programme.desc: Stephanie forsøker å reparere forholdet til boren, Spencer. Mischa treffer Perez Hilton, som mobbet henne da hun var skuespiller. Gnisten mellom Audrina og Justin fortsetter å ulme, men Justin kan ha fått øye for noen annen også.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Clash Of The Titans
programme.desc: En supersexy eks ankommer og skaper drama. Jordan er ute etter Chloe, og når Marty søker trøst hos noen andre, blir det et Geordie-oppgjør.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Max Makes His Move
programme.desc: Følelser raser i villaen når Chloe gjør Marty forbanna, Max og Georgias kjærlighet blusser opp igjen, og Dean har planer for Che, men vil en ekskjæreste ødelegge for ham?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Ex Rated
programme.desc: Ankomsten til to esker opprører huset. Georgie leker med følelsene til Max. Forholdet til Marty og Chloe settes på prøve når Marty avslører sin pikante, lille hemmeligheten.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Actions Speak Louder Than Words
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet skaper kaos på stranden når Stevie får velge hvem som må hjem. Chloe ønsker litt fysisk oppmerksomhet av Sam, og Brads nye kjærlighetsforhold gjør ham overlykkelig.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: The Fight For Georgia
programme.desc: Forholdet til Chloe og Sam er som en berg-og-dal-bane. Max går lei av Stevie og finner noe morsommere et annet sted. Ankomsten til en ny eks får Georgia og Brad til å spore av.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Lawanna's Volkswagen Bug.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Josh's Chevrolet K5 Blazer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Mary's Nissan Pulsar.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Tenita's Ford Thunderbird.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Mike's Grumman Kurbmaster Wonder Bread Truck.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Spechelle's Mercedes-Benz 300SD.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Robert's Chevrolet Van.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Laila's Plymouth Grand Voyager Expresso.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Seth's Nissan Maxima.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Vanessa's Ford Festiva L.

programme.title: Are You The One?: You Can't Handle the Truth
programme.desc: 10 single kvinner og 10 single menn skal tilbringe en måned sammen mens de finner ut hvem som passer sammen. Klarer de det, vil de dele den største prissummen i MTVs historie - en million dollar.

programme.title: Are You The One?: The Temptation of Chris T
programme.desc: Chris T risikerer hele premien på en million dollar fordi han ikke kan gi slipp på Shanley, og når Ryans dagbøker forsvinner, søker han trøst hos Kayla - som i sin tur søker trøst hos Wes.

programme.title: Are You The One?: A Real 'G'
programme.desc: Spenningen eksploderer mellom Jacy og Simone ettersom begge jentene kjemper om Johns følelser. Ting blir hett når Brittany og Adam tar en tur til Boom-Boom Room. Utfordringen avslører pinlige hemmeligheter om jentenes gamle vaner.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Karma's a Bitch
programme.desc: I utfordringen avslører guttas ekskjærester saker og ting og overnatter i huset. Brittany har vanskelig for å akseptere at Adam ikke er interessert, og Coleysia og Ashleigh fyrer opp under romantikken.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Double Shot
programme.desc: Det er spent mellom John og Simone. Kayla blir interessert i Wes igjen, men hun holder fortsatt på Ryan. Gjengen blir i godt humør når de får sende to par til sannhetsboksen etter fosskonkurransen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Turn The Paige
programme.desc: Alle prøver å finne ut hvilket som er det neste perfekte par. Kayla blir avslørt når hun spiller ut Ryan mot Wes, og Simone prøver å splitte Chris T og Shanley for godt. Et besøk i sannhetsboksen snur opp-ned på huset.

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom
programme.desc: Opplev de dramatiske øyeblikkene når de unge mødrene takler hverdagslige utfordringer eller opplever uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Det er uavbrutt drama hele dagen, hver dag.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With the dining room transformed into an Italian bistro, all eight chefs learn that they will participate in the beloved blind taste test challenge, gelato edition. With two tables of 12 patrons, the chefs rush to see who finishes first.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The seven remaining chefs are called down to the dining room to discover two ice dancers performing a routine. Chef Ramsay explains ice dancing can be romantic, just as dessert can be. For their challenge they must cook an extraordinary dessert.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In the first challenge, the final six chefs break through a case, retrieving a random ingredient they will have to cook with. The second challenge has each chef cooking with the same four ingredients. The third challenge is a surf and turf challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The five chefs compete in Chef Ramsay's Taste It, Now Make It challenge, recreating his intricate eggs benedict dish. Later, the fish station struggles at dinner service, leaving the chef in charge of it in real danger of being sent home.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs undertake a tableside challenge, creating dishes for esteemed brigades acting as judges. Later, elimination surprises everyone, including Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Following emotional reunions with their proud parents, Chef Ramsay tasks the final two chefs with creating five meals in only 60 minutes, with the winner earning first pick for their brigade in the final challenge.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Tilbakeblikk
programme.desc: Når en gullgraver blir drept etter å ha gravd opp en skatt som hadde vært forsvunnet siden 1860-tallet, blir Walker ledet ut i ørkenen av ånden til den legendariske Texas Ranger Hays Cooper for å avsløre sannheten om forsvinningen til det skjulte gullet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Stillingskrig, del 1
programme.desc: En berømt internasjonal leiemorder blir hyret inn av en fengslet narkobaron for å drepe en meksikansk presidentkandidat, og Walker og Trivette får i oppdrag å beskytte ham under besøket i Texas.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Sprengt i filler
programme.desc: En fange på rømmen vil drepe alle som var ansvarlige for å sende ham i fengsel. Han angriper dem én etter en og sparer Walker til slutt.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chris Drama Pfaff
programme.desc: Robs fetter Drama hjelper til med å presentere ukens klipp, blant annet Family Dysfunction, Your Friend's a Dick, Little Rollers, bisarre Brazilian Lap Dance og uskyldige som får svi i Failure To Commit.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Judd Leffew
programme.desc: Okserytteren Judd Leffew lærer Chanel hvorvidt okser blir svimle, og Rob viser A Bunch of Bull og Angry Animals. Du får også se blant annet idiotkonkurransen Ridiculousness Decathlon.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Biker Fox
programme.desc: Caite Upton er tilbake, og Biker Fox slutter seg til panelet for litt spandexmoro i Biker Down. I Birds Are D**ks minner Rob oss på hvorfor fugler er idioter, før det hele avsluttes med velfortjent hevn i Animal Payback.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan Dunn
programme.desc: TV-stjernen Ryan Dunn blir med på moroa, og Rob viser problemene med lavere utdanning i Lower Education. Du får også se blant annet Out of Your League, That's What You Get, Let Me Help You Hurt Yourself, og Accidental Filth.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Amber og Gary oppdager at det ikke er noe som heter ferie når man har baby. Maci krangler Ryan om hans nye kjæreste. Farrah har et følelsesladet møte med moren. Catelynn oppdager at Tyler fortsatt er sint på grunn av en gammel løgn.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Forholdet til Catelynn og Tyler er i trøbbel igjen da Catelynn røper en ny løgn. Gary kler seg ut som påskehare for Leah, men en krangel får Amber til å tvile på forlovelsen. Macis nye kjæreste møter Bentley, og Farrah blir svindlet.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Maci er i tvil om Kyle er klar til å være en del av Bentleys liv. Farrah prøver speeddating. Amber forbereder seg til eksamen, men med en baby er det vanskeligere enn ventet. Retten sender Catelynn stefar på avrusing.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Illusion
programme.desc: Cinnamon and Rollin become cabaret performers in a plot to get a deranged man (guest Fritz Weaver) to fall in love with Cinnamon, then kill her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Interrogator
programme.desc: In a bold experiment with a man's mind, the IMF blanks out an enemy agent's memory (guest star Henry Silva), then sets out to make him think he is someone else.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Controllers (Part 1)
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy and guest star Dina Merrill join the Impossible Missions Force to fight a mind-destroying drug that could enslave the free world in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Controllers (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jim Phelps lets himself be framed for murder in a scheme to discredit a scientist who has developed a mind-destroying drug in the second of a two-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Code
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy becomes a member of the Impossible Missions Force and, as Paris of the IMF, helps crack a vital code by hijacking a plane so the enemy can capture one of the passengers

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Tareq sails out to Bornholm, a Danish island close to southern tip of Sweden. The islanders are fiercely self-sufficient and this attitude reflects in the huge number of food producers making products that are sold both locally and internationally.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kiruna
programme.desc: Tareq arrives in Kiruna, over 200km north of the Arctic Circle. With the weather getting down to -30C, Tareq takes part in snow picnics, firing up the smoker, and using snow and ice as part of the recipes he prepares.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Here's Nathan!
programme.desc: Kavos. Det er pinlig stemning mellom Sophie, Gaz og Chantelle etter krangelen deres. Aaron er endelig tilbake, men Marnie er ikke fornøyd. Chantelle og Marty kjemper om Chloe, noe som fører til at Chantelle tar en stor avgjørelse.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Playing Mind Games
programme.desc: Dagen etter at Chantelle dro, så får Sophie store nyheter fra sjefen Anna, Aaron må hentes av ambulanse, og Chloe forsøker å komme seg over Marty. Men når Marty sjekker opp noen, går festen fort nedover.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gaz's True Feelings
programme.desc: Marty havner på sykehus etter strandfesten. Sjefen Anna har store nyheter til Sofie. Nathan pønsker ut en uvanlig plan for å hjelpe Chloe. Gaz fatter en beslutning angående Charlotte. Aaron blir rasende når Marnie går til Marty.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Hole In One
programme.desc: Geordiene når bristepunktet. Marty prøver å gjøre det godt igjen, men vil Chloe tilgi ham? Vil Aaron og Marnie klare å finne tilbake til hverandre? På bassengfesten har Holly problemer med å holde seg på beina, og Kyles stunt slår feil.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Big Decision
programme.desc: Chloe og Marty flørter igjen. Klarer de å bare være gode venner? Sjefen Anna har store nyheter til Kyle. Holly misliker det og bestemmer seg for noe som vil forandre alt for familien. Sesongslutt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: New Workers
programme.desc: Oi Oi! Geordiene er tilbake! Sjefen Anna sjokkerer gjengen ved å sende inn noen nye deltagere. Gutta blir glade, men ikke Sophie og Chloe, og det går skeis på den første utekvelden.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sleeping with the Enemy
programme.desc: Gjengen må takle konsekvensene av jentenes krangel. Angelina dater Jose fra klubben, og Jenni og Snooki kler seg i hjemmelagde beskyttelsesdrakter for å rydde opp før Snookis date.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike truer med å fortelle Jose om Angelina og Vinny. Vinnys familie kommer på besøk. Og Vinny og Pauly finner drømmejentene, men en vil få knust hjertet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dirty Pad
programme.desc: Angelina er i trøbbel når gjengen får vite at hun lå med Jose etter en natt med Vin. Men den siste dråpen kommer når Mike oppdager flere ubehageligheter på badet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gone, Baby, Gone
programme.desc: Mike gjenforens med sin kanadiske skjønnhet, til stor underholdning for hele huset. Angelina forteller gjengen hva hun syns om dem, noe som gjør Snooki rasende og får begeret til å flyte over.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Girls Like That
programme.desc: Vinny velger mellom to grupper jenter. Siden Angelina er borte vil Snooki at hun og Jenni skal skvære opp med Sam. Gleden blir kortvarig for Snooki, når Mike blir stadig mer fiendtlig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Alle er frustrerte over Mike - han får gjengen sparket ut av en klubben, får bilen tauet vekk, brenner nesten ned huset og svikter Pauly. To ganger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Snow
programme.desc: The man who killed Catherine and took her baby sends an assassin to get Vincent. He manages to find the underground world and goes looking for him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Beggar's Comet
programme.desc: Not wanting to put the Tunnel World in further danger, Vincent decides to leave the tunnels and with the death of Snow, Gabriel plots for Vincent's demise.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Time to Heal
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the boat explosion that most likely killed Elliot, Diana is shocked when she encounters a wounded Vincent who collapses on Catherine's grave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Chimes at Midnight
programme.desc: After Vincent entrusts Snow's ring to Diana, she quickly discovers Gabriel's henchman have targeted her and soon kidnap her and take her to Gabriel.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Invictus
programme.desc: With Vincent caged, Gabriel allows him to see his infant son who suddenly begins to make a miraculous recovery.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Fleas
programme.desc: Having just stabbed a man on a street-corner, Willie, a wheelchair-bound former Vietnam POW arrives at JAG headquarters to report "a 30-year-old murder" which he's just committed. Willie relates that while imprisoned he knew Harm's father.

programme.title: JAG: Against All Enemies
programme.desc: Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: JAG: Impact
programme.desc: Harm and Bud investigate the crash of a Marine helicopter whose dead pilot is being blamed for the incident. They discover the chopper seems to have been hit by some form of UFO. Government security officials want to maintain a cover-up at all costs.

programme.title: JAG: People V. Rabb
programme.desc: Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: JAG: Defensless
programme.desc: A woman Navy ensign shoots and kills a Turkish colonel; she claims self-defense.

programme.title: JAG: With Intent to Die
programme.desc: With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ex Plus Y / Graham And Kelly / Golden Agers
programme.desc: In "Ex Plus Y," newlyweds Terri and Ron Larson (Loretta "M*A*S*H" Swit and Richard "Soap" Mulligan) are adjusting well until Terri encounters ex-husband Barney (Robert Reed) aboard ship with his lady friend.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Message For Maureen / Acapulco Connection / Gotcha
programme.desc: In "Message for Maureen," a famous female tennis pro (Brenda Benet) confined to a wheelchair as the result of a serious accident, finds herself in a relationship with a sports writer (Bill Bixby) who was once her severest critic.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity
programme.desc: In "Help, Murder," Denise and Bret (Michele Lee and David Groh) are a married couple getting away from their three kids for the first time.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please
programme.desc: In "The Joker is Mild," has-been comedian Barry Keyes (Phil Foster) abuses his family tie with cruise director Julie in an astonishing attempt to make a comeback.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx
programme.desc: In "The Identical Problem," twins Helen and Ellen (both played by Diana "Soap" Canova) pretend to be one person, which nearly drives Doc crazy because Helen is warm, Ellen is cold and Doc is feeling amorous.

programme.title: Happy Days: Nose is for News
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Joanie's First Kiss
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Treasure Of Manco
programme.desc: MacGyver heads down to Peru to investigate the death of an old friend's father, who was searching for legendary Incan treasure.

programme.title: MacGyver: Deep Cover
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover to investigate the theft of a valuable sonar detecting device.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Lost Amadeus
programme.desc: MacGyver gets drawn into a wacky woman's struggle to keep a vintage violin out of the hands of opportunistic criminals.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hearts Of Steel
programme.desc: MacGyver is called on to investigate the kidnapping of a wealthy industrialist's daughter.

programme.title: MacGyver: Passages
programme.desc: MacGyver has a ghostly encounter while fighting for his life in a hospital bed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vendetta
programme.desc: Convinced that his brother was framed for murder, a psychopath is determined to get even and holds Matlock’s associates hostage.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mayor (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock uncovers unflattering secrets about the late mayor of Chicago while defending an aging hippie activist accused of the man’s assassination.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mayor (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s trip to the Windy City to defend a 1960’s radical accused of murdering Chicago’s mayor comes to a head in the second part of this dramatic two-part episode.

programme.title: Matlock: The Black Widow
programme.desc: Matlock takes the case of Ken Wilson, convicted of murdering his wife, whose body was never found. Recently released from prison after seven years, Wilson sets out to find his missing wife but gets arrested again.

programme.title: Matlock: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A box of mutilated flowers and slashed photos drives pop-singer Shanda into a state of shock. After she collapses and her road tour grinds to a halt, Dr. Mark Sloan takes pity on Shanda and embarks on a search to find her mysterious stalker.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Still groggy from a visit to the dentist, Dr. Sloan is mystified when a noted fund-raiser dies while visiting his home. Adding to the confusion, the body mysteriously disappears before the police get there!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's free tickets to a friend's magic show become an invitation to murder when the magician mysteriously dies on stage in the middle of his escape act!

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Four Guidos and a Baby
programme.desc: Mens Nicole og Jenni forsøker å reparere vennskapet sitt, tar Vinny og Pauly sitt forhold til neste nivå. Gutta ender Vegas-turen med alle små guidoers drøm.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Back to Seaside
programme.desc: Med Vegas bak seg, drar guidoene tilbake til 2009 med en ferie på Seaside der det hele begynte.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Vinny and Angelina: A Love Story
programme.desc: På Seaside blir det kaotisk mellom Vinny og Angelina, og guidoene koser seg med en hyggelig kveld i det gamle huset sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: What a Drag
programme.desc: Deena finner ut kjønnet til sin lille kjøttbolle, Ronnie kommer på overraskelsesbesøk, og det blir interessant når guidoene tar med seg sine kjærester til Atlantic City for å se DJ Pauly D spinne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: AWKWARD City
programme.desc: Ankomsten til Ronnies babymamma, Jen, får romkameratene til å være på vakt mens de prøver å feire Paulys bursdag i Atlantic City. Og Staten Island-kjærlighetsdramaet tar en merkelig vending.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Where's the Beach?
programme.desc: Guidoene drar til stranda for en siste, episk ferie før sommeren tar slutt. Angelina har lyst på Vinny, og Snooki er klar for å feste som om det var 2009.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto engages Challenger Masayoshi Kimura in this battle of rice.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Sakai, known as the Iron Chef French, will have his hands full in this battle specially designed around Wedgwood china.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a master chef hailing from Kyoto. He has the support of the former Iron Chef Michiba and Dr. Yatori. Can the Iron Chef win this battle?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a seafood expert who chooses and masterfully cooks gifts from the sea. He has apprenticed in the top kitchens of Japan. Which competitor will find the soul of the sea?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a stubborn chef descended from a long line of Tokyo dwellers. The Iron Chef will have his hands full facing such a strong tradition.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is one of the few Mexican food specialists in Tokyo. This is a Latin duel at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John III
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John pengerådgivning av 'Mini-Daymonds', møter noen rasende bier som skaper 'Biebataljer' og tester produkter i 'Prøv før du kjøper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood rådløse på sjøen og blir helt 'Havkorka', kaster for mange erteposer i 'Villvest-Cornhole' og må jobbe med egen tålmodighet fordi de 'Avskyr å vente'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' klatrer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz i feil trær med 'Døde greiner', klatrer opp på feil person i 'Dårlige skulderholdere' og blir intense på kontoret med 'Ekstrem kontorstoling'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Paige Desorbo se noen ryggradpirrende fall i 'Ryggknekkere', hører hvordan Rob sparte penger for å flytte til California i 'Lagerleker' og avslutter med smerte ved vannet i 'Tørr landing'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' vil Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Paige DeSorbo unngå å få nesen ut av ledd i 'Neseborsjokk', unngår små, gira råtasser i 'Helvete på plasthjul' og kliner til med noen frampå eldre damer i 'Sugne bestemødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood sparkesykkel-kollisjoner til et høyere nivå med 'Sparkesykkelspark', konfronterer søppeldagen direkte med 'Vanskelig søppel' og snur uhell til hell i 'Utilsiktede seiere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut håret med 'Partyrotter', ler av noen ordentlige 'Krimklovner' og tar en titt på ulike 'Krasjkamera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood X
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å bære alt i én omgang i 'For mye å bære', slår seg løs på do med 'Båskriminalitet' og er ekstremt galante som i 'De beste kjærestene'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis farene ved stiger i 'Stigekræsj', føler at de må følge fulle venner hjem i 'Fylleleveranser' og oppdager at ikke alle maskoter er like i 'Maskotproblemer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood verdens verste smerter i 'Halebeinbrutalitet', opplever at allergisesongen er ille i 'Naturlig snørrete' og drar langt ut på landet og fester i 'Partylåver'

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipfighter Hunder av Krig
programme.desc: Mannskapet oppdager at en falsk planet, Marduk, har skapt masseødeleggelsesvåpen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Lepras kyss
programme.desc: En hitman med navnet Leper er rettet mot lederne for det nye samveldet.

programme.title: Andromeda: For hvem bjelleveiene
programme.desc: Andromeda hjemsøkes av en mystisk skapning som kommer ombord under en solstorm.

programme.title: Andromeda: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort
programme.desc: Når en forlengst mistet kjærlighet kommer tilbake, forsvinner Tyr fra skipet for å beskytte henne mot en snikmorder.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ukontrable mannen
programme.desc: Sett i et alternativt univers der Dylan døde og Gaheris Rhade prøver å reformere Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda: Delenda Est
programme.desc: Gruppen som angrep Andromeda under den første undertegningen av Commonwealth-charteret, vender tilbake til mer kaos.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: McFall, Missing Mom, Puerto Rican Monster (a.k.a. Chupacabra), Red Robin Killer and Drummond's Dollars.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Is Doreen Dead?, Kicked Out Killer, Suspect Turned Victim, Father Solanus Casey and Five Separated Siblings.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Interstate Death, Where's the Witness?, Animal Therapist, Update: The Promise, Wrong Place, Wrong Time and Always Karen.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fugitive Fireman, The Wanderer, New in Town, Samuel's Ghost, Update: Hoochie Coochie and Cash Web.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Lone Lopez, Ghost Lights, Marie Hilley, Missing Newbown and Sunshine Guys.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Compulsion
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker: the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead In The Water
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Short Fuse
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which was mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid, the box exploded, killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Remnant of Blame
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Lady in Grey
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate claims of a ghost lady in grey haunting Windleshaw abbey, St Helens, Merseyside. Over 600 years old and with new paranormal encounters reported almost weekly. Bex and Sean attempt to make contact with the infamous lady in grey.

programme.title: Ghost Dimensions Top 10 Scariest Moments
programme.desc: A special look into the top 10 of Ghost Dimension’s scariest moments. Venturing into the UK’s most haunted buildings, we take a look back at the scariest captures.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Scars for Life
programme.desc: Could a tattoo studio be haunted? Has a Ouija board opened a gateway to the spirit dimension? Ghost Dimension spend the night investigating Deviant Ink tattoo studio.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Poltergeist House
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate a Poltergeist haunting a homeowner who is a wits end. Poltergeistal activity in the home is terrorizing the tenant and paranormal investigators Bex and Sean are about to start the exorcism of this demonic entity away for good.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Better Not Fail That Test!
programme.desc: Lainie and Justin have a 9-month-old baby together. Justin hurts Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?
programme.desc: Gina believes that her daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who Did This?
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Over the Edge
programme.desc: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda’s only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: Neighbors are aghast when Ernestine Addison and her teen son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. The case heats up when Kenda receives word that the killer’s murderous rampage isn’t over just yet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target and who was collateral damage.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Master Key
programme.desc: When a pregnant mother and her two young sons are brutally slain, pressure mounts for the CSPD to catch the cold-blooded monster who did it.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits at The Lord Eldon
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to the old town of Knutsford, Cheshire to investigate the historic Lord Eldon Inn, hoping to contact the spirit of Sarah Ann Pollitt who is said to haunt the pub.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Monks and Demons at The Rutland Arms Hotel
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team journeys to Nottingham and the historic Rutland Arms Hotel. The pub and hotel have seen several centuries of change, and with that change came tragedy.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Final Session at Galleries of Justice
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travel back in time to The Galleries of Justice in Nottingham. This was a one stop shop for justice where criminals were held awaiting trial.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Strange Killing of Ken Rex McElroy
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane explore the gripping tale of justice, mystery and community in Ken Rex McElroy's demise.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Scandalous Murder of William Desmond Taylor
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane untangle a web of Hollywood's secrets in the scandalous murder of William Desmond Taylor.

programme.title: Mutant X: Deadly Desire
programme.desc: Teamet prøver å stoppe Eckhart fra å skaffe seg et sjeldent element, men en tyv får det. Kvinnen som kan få menn til å bli forelsket i henne, setter blikket mot Brennan.

programme.title: Mutant X: A Breed Apart
programme.desc: Mutant X møter en ny fraksjon av New Mutants kalt Strand, ledet av den kraftige første mutanten Gabriel Ashlocke.

programme.title: Mutant X: Past as Prologue
programme.desc: I et desperat forsøk på å redde sitt eget liv, gjenoppliver Ashlocke en gammel egyptisk alkymist som utgjør en dødelig trussel mot Mutant X-teamet.

programme.title: Mutant X: Power Play
programme.desc: Teamet sliter med å frigjøre en militær oberst som har truet med å slippe løs et kjernefysisk holocaust.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er i Brussel, Belgia på jakt etter den hellige soluret til Zeus for å stoppe vampyrene.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 2
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On the Case.

programme.title: On the Case: This is for Her

programme.title: On the Case: Almost Home

programme.title: On the Case: Mixed Signals

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Birthday from Hell

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Big Deal

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: 40/40/40

programme.title: Cops: Trouble in Paradise

programme.title: Cops: Carjacked Up

programme.title: Cops: No Helmet, No Ride

programme.title: Cops: Sidewalk Licker
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: Cops: From Sixty to Zero
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.

programme.title: Cops: First Time Caller
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: Cops: Kicking and Screaming
programme.desc: An intoxicated man suspected of domestic abuse refuses to obey deputies' orders, police find drugs in a woman's car, and an alleged prostitute encounters the police.

programme.title: Cops: Mixed Emotions

programme.title: Cops: Better Safe Than Sorry
